reference_sql_files.raw_sql:
{{ config(materialized='table', schema='acquisition', tags=['acquisition', 'daily']) }}

WITH google AS (
  SELECT 'google' AS channel, ...
),
meta AS (
  SELECT 'meta' AS channel, ...
),
partnerize AS (
  SELECT 'partnerize' AS channel, ...
),
unioned AS (
  SELECT * FROM google
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM meta
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM partnerize
  UNION ALL ...
)
SELECT
  {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(['channel','date','country']) }} AS md5_key,
  *
FROM unioned
reference_sql_files.compiled_sql: CREATE TABLE ... AS WITH google AS ( SELECT 'google' AS channel, ... )

models:
  - name: marketing_spend_day_country_agg
    columns:
      - name: md5_key
        tests: [unique, not_null]
